allow: PowerShell($jar = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.m2\\repository\\org\\springframework\\amqp\\spring-rabbit\\4.0.3\\spring-rabbit-4.0.3.jar"; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\($jar\); $zip.Entries | Select-Object -First 30 | Select-Object FullName; $zip.Dispose\(\))
